posts.title: A Symphony in Code
posts.text: Who Am IHey, I’m Bibit Kunwar Chhetri. I’m someone who genuinely enjoys learning, not just the easy stuff, but the kind of learning that takes time, effort, failure, and patience. I’ve always felt that going the hard way teaches me things that shortcuts never could. That’s the path I’ve chosen, one where growth comes from struggle, and clarity from chaos. Software engineering didn’t just give me a career path, it gave me a different way of thinking. A way to break problems into pieces, to see structure where there was once noise, and to constantly seek better answers, in code and in life. About This SiteThis website is where I’ll slowly open up about the things I go through, the new technologies I explore, the hurdles I face, the thoughts that stick with me, and the people I meet along the way. I want this space to feel real, not polished or performative. Some posts might be technical, some reflective, some might just be me trying to figure something out. I don’t have all the answers. I probably never will. But I’m here to share what I know, what I’m learning, what I’m feeling, all in my own time and in my own words. Why I’m HereI’ve always admired how open source works, people coming together to build, to fix, to learn. I hope to contribute to that spirit, not just with code but with honesty. Whatever I go through, whether it’s confusion, excitement, burnout, or breakthrough, I’ll try to share it here. Because that’s how we connect. That’s how we grow. This is just the beginning. I don’t know exactly where I’ll end up, what kind of engineer I’ll become, or what kind of people I’ll meet, but I’m here for it. And I’ll take you along, one post at a time.

pages.text: .cv-header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 30px; } .cv-name { font-size: 28px; margin-bottom: 20px; } .cv-links-row { display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; margin: 8px 0; flex-wrap: wrap; } .cv-links-row a { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; } .cv-links-row .sep { color: inherit; opacity: 0.5; } .cv-section { margin-bottom: 25px; } .cv-section h2 { font-size: 16px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; margin-bottom: 12px; padding-bottom: 5px; border-bottom: 1px solid currentColor; } .exp-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 3px; } .exp-date { opacity: 0.8; } .exp-role { margin-bottom: 8px; } .exp-tech { opacity: 0.7; } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .cv-header { border-bottom-color: #c0c0c0; } .cv-section h2 { border-bottom-color: #c0c0c0; } } @media (max-width: 600px) { .exp-header { flex-direction: column; } .cv-links-row { flex-direction: column; align-items: center; } .cv-links-row .sep { display: none; } } Bibit Kunwar Chhetri kunwar.bibit7@gmail.com | +977 9816655644 github.com/bibitchhetri | bibitkunwar.com.np | linkedin.com/in/bibitchhetri Skills Languages: Python, Bash, SQL, Lua, LISP, JavaScript, Java, LaTeX, C/C++ Technologies & Tools: GNU / Linux, Docker, Kubernetes, Git, Terraform, Ansible, Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, LangChain, LangGraph, WordPress, IoT, Nvim, Emacs Work Experience Lumino Technology Mar 2026 - Present Software Engineer / System Administrator (Mid-Level) Worked as a System Administrator, System Designer, and Backend Engineer, handling end-to-end system architecture and infrastructure management. Designed scalable system architecture and backend services to support high-traffic web applications. Managed servers, deployments, and performance optimization to ensure system reliability and uptime. Developed and maintained backend APIs and services for the product english.nepalbahas.com (on-going). System Design, Backend Development, DevOps, Server Management Wow finstack, Pokhara Sept 2025 - Feb 2026 Software Development Engineer (Intern) Worked on backend development using Java and Spring Boot, contributing to RESTful APIs used in fintech applications. Built data scraping scripts using Python to collect and process financial data from external web sources, enabling automated data acquisition for internal analysis and reporting. Assisted in API development, validation, and debugging, ensuring reliable communication between backend services and client applications. Spring Boot, Selenium, Beautiful Soup, JPA/Hibernate, Liquibase, Maven Freelance AI Engineer (Client: World Bank Data Analyst) Aug 2025 - Sept 2025 AI Application Development Developed an AI-powered automated risk monitoring system that fetches daily financial news, performs LLM-based sentiment analysis, and assigns contextual scores to identify potential risks. Built a semantic search and query interface using RAG and Pinecone Vector DB, enabling interactive exploration of entity-specific news through a Streamlit dashboard. Implemented automation pipelines for daily data ingestion, processing, sentiment scoring, and email reporting, reducing manual monitoring efforts and providing timely insights. RAG, Vectorless RAG Agentic Architecture Design, SerpAPI, Pinecone VectorDB, Streamlit Freelance Data Engineer (Client: Stanford University Researcher) May 2025 - Jun 2025 Data Extraction and Preprocessing Scraped US FOMC press release transcripts by building a subtitle extraction automation script and created a cleaned research dataset through preprocessing. Additional freelancing experiences: Economics Simulation Model in Python, SQL Agent for Simulated Banking Database, eCommerce WebApp for a clothing/restaurant business on WordPress. Education GCES Pokhara Jul 2021 - Aug 2025 B.E. in Software Engineering CGPA: 3.34/4 Relevant Coursework: Operating Systems, Object Oriented Programming, Databases, Discrete Maths, Data Structures and Algorithms, Computer Networks, Machine Learning, Data Mining, Advance Data Structures and Algorithms, Information Retrieval, Image Processing, Organizational Management, Engineering Economics Project Work TriNetra: Real-Time Violence Detection System (2025): Developed a mobile-integrated CCTV monitoring system to automatically detect physical violence in real-time video streams using a hybrid deep learning model (MobileNetV2 + Bi-LSTM). Built a microservice-based architecture with FastAPI, Redis queues, and FFmpeg for video processing and alert notifications. Python, FastAPI, TensorFlow, React Native, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker, RTSP, FFmpeg GENIE – Bilingual Voice Recognition Tool (2024): Built a bilingual Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) system for Nepali–English mixed speech using a Transformer encoder–decoder architecture. Trained the model on the Crowd-Sourced Nepali Speech Corpus and Svarah datasets and deployed it as a web application. Python, FastAPI, JavaScript, MySQL, Tailwind CSS PicAtU: Face Recognition Photo Retrieval System (2023): Developed a web application that enables users to find and download event photos using facial recognition. Implemented face detection and encoding with the Dlib C++ library and designed a microservice-based system with React and multi-language backend services. React, Node.js, Flask, MySQL, C++, Dlib, CUDA Awards and Certificates Mentor - National Innovation Center, Pokhara: Helping students and working professionals to get better at Linux fundamentals and get them ready for EHR project. Supervised Machine Learning: Regression and Classification - Coursera (Stanford Online), DeepLearning.AI Annual Nepal AI School (ANAIS 2023) - Organized by NAAMII – NepAl Applied Mathematics and Informatics Institute Volunteer/Organizer of WordCamp Nepal, 2024 - Organized international event in Pokhara Runner-Up – GCES IT Expo: Organized by GCES IT Club

pages.title: Privacy Policy
pages.text: Welcome to my corner of the internet! Here’s how I handle your privacy. What I CollectI don’t collect any personal data from you. This is a simple blog where I share my thoughts on software engineering, open source, and life. Third-Party ServicesTo keep things running and understand how people use my site, I use: Google Analytics – Helps me understand which posts are helpful Google AdSense – Shows ads to support the blog (may use cookies) CookiesThe ads you see may use cookies to show relevant content. You can opt out of personalized ads anytime at Google Ad Settings. Your RightsYou’re welcome to read, share, and learn from my posts. If you have any questions about privacy, just drop me an email. ContactQuestions? Reach out at kunwar.bibit7@gmail.com
